name: Furtive Techniques Fur Hire, Fur All Your Ultimate Moves
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>空</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>牙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>が</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>団</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>奥</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>義</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Secret Techniques of the Skyfang Brigade
desc: Target face-up cards on the field, up to the number of monsters "Fur Hire" you control with different names; destroy those targeted cards, or if you control at least 1 each of Level 8 or higher and Link-3 or higher monsters "Fur Hire", you can banish those targeted cards instead. If a Level 8 or higher, or Link-3 or higher, monster "Fur Hire" is Special Summoned to your field, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can add this card to your hand. You can only use 1 "Furtive Techniques Fur Hire, Fur All Your Ultimate Moves" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: Target face-up cards on the field, up to the number of monsters "Fur Hire" you control with different names; destroy those targeted cards, or if you control at least 1 each of Level 8 or higher and Link-3 or higher monsters "Fur Hire", you can banish those targeted cards instead. If a Level 8 or higher, or Link-3 or higher, monster "Fur Hire" is Special Summoned to your field, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can add this card to your hand. You can only use 1 "Furtive Techniques Fur Hire, Fur All Your Ultimate Moves" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
misc: Requires control of specific Link Rating
